title: Changed board name, now automations work, but display incorrect names. How can I update the names?
excerpt: We are running into an issue with clarity while setting up automations, as the board name that we had for many old automations now has a new name. The automations still appear to work, but all of the names are wrong in t…

posts.author: EthanPenn (Ethan Dale)
posts.cookedHtml: We are running into an issue with clarity while setting up automations, as the board name that we had for many old automations now has a new name. The automations still appear to work, but all of the names are wrong in the automations center. How can we update those without having to delete everything and remake it?
